items.title: Beyond Medical AI and AI Drug Discovery: Why Biomedicine Needs World Models
items.description:
Over the past decade, AI in medicine has mostly moved through two major waves.

The first wave was medical AI.

It helped machines read, structure, summarize, and predict from medical data:

  • radiology image recognition
  • clinical note extraction
